xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #47

plan.title: Time announcements not triggering when expected

narratives.Description: Time announcements not triggering when expected
narratives.Overview:
## Symptom

Time announce is not triggering when it should. Announcements that should fire at the configured interval do not play (or do not fire when expected).

## Expected behavior

With Announce enabled and a configured interval, time announcements should fire on schedule during playback.

## Context (prior related fix)

Earlier today, PR #46 was merged addressing related symptoms:

- Too-short wall-clock lookahead under background timer throttling
- Enable-before-Play race leaving AnnounceEngine with `enabled=false`

- PR: https://github.com/rockbox37/Relaxanator/pull/46
- Merge commit on `main`: `e14cabf`

If this report is still being filed after that merge, treat it as either a **regression**, an **incomplete fix**, or a **different scenario**. Investigators should verify whether residual timing/enable races remain, or whether a new path is involved.

## Suggested repro hints

1. Enable Announce (and set an interval).
2. Start playback (Play) — also try enabling Announce *before* Play (prior race path).
3. Leave the tab in the background long enough for an announcement window (background timer throttling).
4. Observe whether announcements fire when expected.

## Notes

- Do not assume PR #46 fully resolved this until reproduced against current `main` (`e14cabf` or later).
narratives.Requirements:
FR-1: With Announce enabled and a configured interval, during playback the engine schedules and speaks time announcements at the next wall-clock interval boundary (and subsequent boundaries).
FR-2: Enabling Announce before pressing Play still results in announcements firing once audio is running (no stuck silent engine / enable race).
FR-3: When the tab is backgrounded long enough for timer throttling around an announcement window, the boundary still fires via lookahead scheduling and/or miss catch-up within the grace window.
NFR-1: Automated tests cover lookahead scheduling, miss catch-up, and resync; the #46 scenarios must not regress.
narratives.LockedDecisions: Refinement 2026-07-13 (#47 Evaluate lock): (1) AC locked as FR-1–3 + NFR-1 from the issue body + PR #46 prior-fix context — no product-scope expansion beyond announce firing reliability. (2) Treat post-e14cabf report as residual incomplete fix, regression, or alternate path; root-cause against current main before changing behavior. (3) Out of scope: new intervals/voices/UI copy, preset persistence (#6), break prompts.

references.title: Issue #47: Time announcements not triggering when expected
